translations.terms.subtitle: VetNutri MP - Veterinary Nutrition Manager
translations.terms.point_vets: • This software is intended for veterinary health professionals
translations.terms.point_informative: • Calculations and recommendations are provided for informational purposes
translations.terms.point_responsibility: • The user's responsibility remains complete; they must verify calculations and recommendations before applying them
translations.terms.point_confidential: • Entered data remains confidential and local
translations.terms.author_footer: Developed by S. Lefebvre, DVM, PhD, HDR, Associate Professor in Nutrition at VetAgro Sup.

translations.consultation.edit.validation_error: Please select a general reference and enter a weight before validating the consultation.

translations.consultation.edit.validation_error_weigh: Please enter a weight before validating the consultation.
translations.consultation.edit.bcs.desc.1: Emaciated - Ribs, vertebrae, and pelvic bones very prominent
translations.consultation.edit.bcs.desc.2: Thin - Ribs easily palpable, minimal fat cover
translations.consultation.edit.bcs.desc.3: Slightly thin - Ribs palpable with light fat cover
translations.consultation.edit.bcs.desc.4: Low ideal - Ribs easily palpable, waist visible
translations.consultation.edit.bcs.desc.5: Ideal - Ribs palpable without excess fat, waist well defined
translations.consultation.edit.bcs.desc.6: High ideal - Ribs palpable with light fat cover
translations.consultation.edit.bcs.desc.7: Overweight - Ribs difficult to palpate, visible fat deposits
translations.consultation.edit.bcs.desc.8: Obese - Ribs very difficult to palpate, heavy fat cover
translations.consultation.edit.bcs.desc.9: Severely obese - Ribs not palpable, massive fat deposits
